title: Radiant Kenyan Orange Salad
description: A bright, kid-friendly salad that mixes sweet orange segments with creamy avocado, crisp cucumber, and a lightly sautéed spice mix to create an airy, flavorful dish perfect for lunch.
instructions: Peel the oranges, cut the peel off the segments, and separate the segments from the membranes.
Dice the avocado into bite‑sized cubes and set aside.
Dice the cucumber into small cubes.
Heat a small skillet over medium heat, add the olive oil, and let it shimmer for 10 seconds.
Add the grated ginger, ground cumin, salt, and pepper to the skillet and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour the honey into the skillet, stir until it coats the spices, and let it bubble for 30 seconds.
Transfer the sautéed spice mixture into a large bowl and pour the lime juice over it, mixing well.
Add the orange segments, avocado cubes, and cucumber cubes to the bowl and toss gently until everything is evenly coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more salt, pepper, or honey.
Serve immediately on a chilled plate or bowl, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh coriander if desired.
